#TEST

```{r}
#| label: alpha-diversity-analysis

# Source the functions
source(normalizePath("utils/r-utils.r"))
source(normalizePath("_environment.required"))
load(normalizePath("data/seqdata.RData"))

b12_base <- readRDS(file.path(RESULTS, "B12-status-subgroup-analysis/b12-baseline-seqdata.rds"))

# Load required packages
library(phyloseq)
library(vegan)
library(picante)
library(tidyverse)
library(gtsummary)
library(ggpubr)

# Define variables for analysis
group_vars <- c("b12_tertiles", "arm")
strata_vars <- c("sexf", "arm")

# Run analysis
source("scripts/alpha-diversity-analysis.r")
results <- analyze_alpha_diversity(
  physeq = b12_base,  # Your phyloseq object
  group_vars = group_vars,
  strata_vars = strata_vars,
  save_path = file.path(RESULTS, "B12-status-subgroup-analysis/alpha-diversity")
)

# Display results
# Overall summary for b12_status
results$b12_status$summary

# Stratified by sex
results$b12_status$strata$sexf

# Plot overall results
results$b12_status$plots$overall

# Plot stratified by sex
results$b12_status$plots$stratified$sexf
```
